title: drosanthemum bellum
intro: Drosanthemum bellum, also known as the Bell's daisy or Bell's vygie, is a succulent plant species native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and providing relief from colds and flu. Drosanthemum bellum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
